title: Qwen3-ASR segmented route regression suite
created_from: User decision to make segmented route the main ASR path and gradually retire cumulative recompute

follow_ups.title: Promote segmented route from evaluated path to daily backend
follow_ups.reason: If numeric, base, and manual App smoke results are acceptable, the LaunchAgent/App runtime should use the segmented service rather than cumulative recompute.

follow_ups.title: Tune segment boundary and merge behavior
follow_ups.reason: Segmented output avoids long-session cumulative recompute, but quality depends on segment length, soft text budget, overlap/dedup policy, and final merge behavior.
